input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.3.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.3.1.1
            TITLE: the vehicle must have a carburetor or throttle body.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.1.1: The vehicle must have a carburetor or throttle body.
IC.3.1.1 The vehicle must have a carburetor or throttle body.  
a. The carburetor or throttle body may be of any size or design.  
b. Boosted applications must not use carburetors.

final_answer:
Rule IC.3.1.1: The vehicle must have a carburetor or throttle body.
a. The carburetor or throttle body may be of any size or design.
b. Boosted applications must not use carburetors.
